recipes.title: Long video → multiple captioned clips, in one command
recipes.description: Slice any long video into N captioned shorter clips. Transcribe once, auto-pick the moments with AI, trim + caption each in parallel. Optionally reformat to vertical (9:16) for TikTok / Reels / Shorts, square (1:1) for Instagram, or portrait (4:5) — caption anchor auto-adjusts.

recipes.title: One prompt → a vertical AI dance reel
recipes.description: Generate a labeled dance-move grid with GPT Image 2, hand it to Seedance 2 Pro as a reference so the choreography actually follows the moves, then stitch it into a music-synced vertical reel.
